message:
fix(render-svg): fix cluster CSS test by adding member nodes

The test create_ir_with_cluster() created a cluster with 0 member
nodes. Since layout_diagram() only produces LayoutClusterBox entries
for clusters that enclose at least one node, the empty cluster was
never rendered, causing the test to fail when checking for
class="fm-cluster" in the SVG output.

Fix by adding two member nodes with an edge to the test IR, matching
real-world usage where clusters always contain at least one node.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
